entries.name: Crystal Clear Shallows
entries.description: The water is bright and clear. Reefs can be seen below, beautiful and dangerous.

entries.name: Glare on the Water
entries.description: Sun glare hides coral heads and rocks. Navigation is harder.

entries.name: Choppy Shallows
entries.description: Short, sharp waves buffet the hull. Small craft become risky.

entries.name: Low Tide Exposure
entries.description: Reefs and sandbars rise close to the surface. The ship must move carefully.

entries.name: Warm Rain Over Coral
entries.description: Rain reduces visibility, but fresh water can be collected.

entries.name: Hidden Breakers
entries.description: Foam lines reveal dangerous rocks at the last moment.

entries.name: Reef Fog
entries.description: Mist clings to shallow water and sound carries strangely.

entries.name: Bioluminescent Water
entries.description: At night the sea glows blue-green around the hull, beautiful and deeply unsettling.
